Badger Grapple Red — v20.8 Portraits Repaint

Repainted all 5 portrait files (badger/neutral/top/scramble/pace, 96x96)
with the same shading technique as the battle sprites. These are also
tint-multiplied at runtime (StarterScene and MenuScene both call
setTint on the portrait for evolved/recolored roster entries), so the
same discipline applies as the battle sprites: collar/shoulder region
painted near-white so the tint produces correct color rather than mud,
shading done in value only.

Verified in all 3 real usage contexts, not just in isolation:
IntroScene (fixed badger portrait, no tint), StarterScene (tinted per
starter choice, checked two different starters/tints), and confirmed
dimensions before packaging. Zero console errors in any context.

This closes out the full visual-asset pass: environment (7 areas),
battle sprites (10 files), walk sprites (2 files), portraits (5 files)
all now share one consistent shading approach.

Remaining on the list: audio (still completely silent — flagged
several versions ago, still true).

Cache: ?v=208. Proof: title/note reads "v20.8 Portraits Repaint".
